excluded_capabilities: LLM API calls beyond prompting with designated input files

condition_b_files: FILL_IN — list exact files provided to the AI in Condition B

summary: FILL_IN — one paragraph summary: what worked, what did not, and the delta
warnings: TEMPLATE — this file has not been filled in with real run data. Do not draw conclusions from it.
Replace run_id and timestamp_utc with the actual UTC datetime of your run (format: run_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ / YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ).
Replace all FILL_IN placeholders with actual values before treating this as a result.
Replace all zero scores with actual scored values.
Remove these template warnings and add any real caveats about your run (e.g. temperature was unavailable).
One run on one scenario does not support broad conclusions about .aieng utility.
